<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>PetCare – Veterinary Management System</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700;800;900&family=Playfair+Display:wght@700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --purple-dark: #5b3fa6;
    --purple-mid: #7c5cbf;
    --purple-light: #c4a8e8;
    --purple-bg: #f0eaff;
    --purple-soft: #e8dff8;
    --accent: #9b59b6;
    --pink: #d17bbf;
    --green: #27ae60;
    --red: #e74c3c;
    --white: #ffffff;
    --gray: #7f8c8d;
    --light-gray: #ecf0f1;
    --dark: #2c2c3e;
    --border: #d6c8f0;
    --shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(91,63,166,0.10);
    --radius: 16px;
  }

  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  body {
    font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0eaff 0%, #e8dff8 50%, #f9f5ff 100%);
    min-height: 100vh;
    color: var(--dark);
  }

  /* ===== NAV ===== */
  .navbar {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--purple-dark), var(--purple-mid));
    padding: 0 40px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    height: 68px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 16px rgba(91,63,166,0.25);
    position: sticky;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 100;
  }
  .logo {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.7rem;
    color: white;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
  }
  .logo span { color: var(--purple-light); }
  .nav-links {
    display: flex;
    gap: 8px;
  }
  .nav-btn {
    background: none;
    border: none;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
    font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    padding: 8px 18px;
    border-radius: 30px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  .nav-btn:hover, .nav-btn.active {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
    color: white;
  }

  /* ===== SCREENS ===== */
  .screen { display: none; padding: 40px; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .screen.active { display: block; animation: fadeIn 0.35s ease; }
  @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity:0; transform: translateY(12px); } to { opacity:1; transform: translateY(0); } }

  /* ===== PAGE TITLE ===== */
  .page-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 2rem;
    color: var(--purple-dark);
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }
  .page-subtitle { color: var(--gray); font-size: 0.95rem; margin-bottom: 32px; }

  /* ===== CARD ===== */
  .card {
    background: white;
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow);
    padding: 32px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .card-split {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 32px;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .card-split.three { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; }

  /* ===== FORM ELEMENTS ===== */
  .form-group { margin-bottom: 20px; }
  .form-group label {
    display: block;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    color: var(--purple-dark);
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  }
  .form-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; }
  .form-row.three { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; }
  input[type="text"], input[type="email"], input[type="password"],
  input[type="tel"], input[type="date"], input[type="time"],
  select, textarea {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 12px 16px;
    border: 2px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    color: var(--dark);
    background: var(--purple-bg);
    transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
    outline: none;
  }
  input:focus, select:focus, textarea:focus {
    border-color: var(--purple-mid);
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(124,92,191,0.15);
    background: white;
  }
  textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 90px; }

  .radio-group {
    display: flex;
    gap: 20px;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 10px 0;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .radio-group label {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    color: var(--dark);
    cursor: pointer;
    text-transform: none;
    letter-spacing: 0;
  }
  input[type="radio"], input[type="checkbox"] {
    width: auto;
    accent-color: var(--purple-mid);
  }

  /* ===== BUTTONS ===== */
  .btn {
    padding: 13px 32px;
    border-radius: 30px;
    font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif;
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    display: inline-block;
  }
  .btn-primary {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--purple-dark), var(--purple-mid));
    color: white;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(91,63,166,0.3);
  }
  .btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(91,63,166,0.4); }
  .btn-secondary {
    background: white;
    color: var(--purple-dark);
    border: 2px solid var(--purple-mid);
  }
  .btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--purple-bg); }
  .btn-danger {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #c0392b, var(--red));
    color: white;
  }
  .btn-success {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1e8449, var(--green));
    color: white;
  }
  .btn-sm { padding: 8px 20px; font-size: 0.85rem; }

  /* ===== SUCCESS POPUP ===== */
  .success-popup {
    display: none;
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
    z-index: 999;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .success-popup.show { display: flex; }
  .success-box {
    background: white;
    border-radius: 20px;
    padding: 48px 56px;
    text-align: center;
    box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
    animation: popIn 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1);
  }
  @keyframes popIn { from { transform: scale(0.7); opacity:0; } to { transform: scale(1); opacity:1; } }
  .success-icon { font-size: 3.5rem; margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .success-box h3 { font-size: 1.4rem; color: var(--purple-dark); margin-bottom: 8px; }
  .success-box p { color: var(--gray); margin-bottom: 24px; }

  /* ===== HERO (Landing / Welcome) ===== */
  .hero {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 48px;
    align-items: center;
    min-height: 70vh;
    padding: 40px 0;
  }
  .hero-text h1 {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 3.2rem;
    color: var(--purple-dark);
    line-height: 1.2;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }
  .hero-text h1 em { color: var(--accent); font-style: normal; }
  .hero-text p { font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--gray); margin-bottom: 32px; line-height: 1.7; }
  .hero-btns { display: flex; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .hero-visual {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--purple-dark) 0%, var(--purple-mid) 60%, var(--pink) 100%);
    border-radius: 24px;
    padding: 48px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    min-height: 380px;
    box-shadow: 0 16px 48px rgba(91,63,166,0.3);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero-visual::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    width: 300px; height: 300px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    border-radius: 50%;
    top: -80px; right: -80px;
  }
  .hero-visual .big-emoji { font-size: 5rem; margin-bottom: 20px; }
  .hero-visual h2 { color: white; font-size: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 8px; text-align: center; }
  .hero-visual p { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75); text-align: center; font-size: 0.95rem; }
  .feature-pills { display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-top: 20px; justify-content: center; }
  .pill {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
    color: white;
    border-radius: 20px;
    padding: 5px 14px;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
  }

  /* ===== SIGNUP / LOGIN ===== */
  .auth-layout {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.2fr;
    gap: 48px;
    align-items: start;
  }
  .auth-side {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--purple-dark), var(--purple-mid));
    border-radius: 20px;
    padding: 48px 32px;
    color: white;
    min-height: 420px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    text-align: center;
    box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(91,63,166,0.3);
  }
  .auth-side .big { font-size: 4rem; margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .auth-side h2 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.8rem; margin-bottom: 12px; }
  .auth-side p { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); line-height: 1.6; }
  .auth-form-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.8rem;
    color: var(--purple-dark);
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }
  .auth-switch { margin-top: 20px; text-align: center; color: var(--gray); font-size: 0.9rem; }
  .auth-switch a { color: var(--purple-mid); font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; }
  .auth-switch a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
  .terms-row { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
  .terms-row label { font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--gray); font-weight: 600; text-transform: none; letter-spacing: 0; }

  /* ===== HOME DASHBOARD ===== */
  .stats-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 32px; }
  .stat-card {
    background: white;
    border-radius: 14px;
    padding: 24px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 16px;
  }
  .stat-icon { font-size: 2rem; }
  .stat-label { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--gray); font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; }
  .stat-value { font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 900; color: var(--purple-dark); }
  .home-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr; gap: 24px; }
  .pet-list-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 16px;
    padding: 16px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    background: var(--purple-bg);
    transition: box-shadow 0.2s;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .pet-list-item:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(91,63,166,0.15); }
  .pet-avatar {
    width: 52px; height: 52px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--purple-mid), var(--pink));
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .pet-name { font-weight: 800; font-size: 1rem; color: var(--dark); }
  .pet-meta { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--gray); }
  .quick-actions { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; }
  .quick-btn {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--purple-dark), var(--purple-mid));
    color: white;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 16px 20px;
    font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(91,63,166,0.25);
  }
  .quick-btn:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(91,63,166,0.35); }
  .quick-btn.outline {
    background: white;
    color: var(--purple-dark);
    border: 2px solid var(--purple-mid);
    box-shadow: none;
  }
  .quick-btn.outline:hover { background: var(--purple-bg); }
  .appt-mini {
    background: var(--purple-bg);
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 12px 16px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    border-left: 4px solid var(--purple-mid);
  }
  .appt-mini .appt-title { font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--purple-dark); }
  .appt-mini .appt-date { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--gray); }

  /* ===== APPOINTMENT ===== */
  .appt-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.6fr 1fr; gap: 32px; }
  .service-chips { display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; padding: 8px 0; }
  .chip {
    padding: 8px 18px;
    border-radius: 20px;
    border: 2px solid var(--border);
    font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    background: white;
    color: var(--dark);
  }
  .chip.selected, .chip:hover {
    background: var(--purple-dark);
    color: white;
    border-color: var(--purple-dark);
  }
  .appt-summary {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--purple-dark), var(--purple-mid));
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 28px;
    color: white;
  }
  .appt-summary h3 { font-size: 1.1rem; margin-bottom: 16px; opacity: 0.85; }
  .summary-item { margin-bottom: 12px; }
  .summary-label { font-size: 0.78rem; opacity: 0.7; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; }
  .summary-value { font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.95rem; }

  /* ===== RECORDS ===== */
  .records-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.5fr; gap: 32px; }
  .record-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 14px;
    padding: 16px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    background: white;
  }
  .record-item:hover, .record-item.active {
    border-color: var(--purple-mid);
    background: var(--purple-bg);
    box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(91,63,166,0.12);
  }
  .record-icon {
    width: 42px; height: 42px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .record-icon.vacc { background: #e8f5e9; }
  .record-icon.check { background: #e3f2fd; }
  .record-icon.treat { background: #fce4ec; }
  .record-badge {
    margin-left: auto;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    padding: 3px 10px;
    border-radius: 20px;
  }
  .badge-green { background: #e8f5e9; color: #27ae60; }
  .badge-blue { background: #e3f2fd; color: #2196f3; }
  .badge-pink { background: #fce4ec; color: #e91e63; }
  .detail-card {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fdf6ff, white);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 28px;
  }
  .detail-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px; }
  .detail-avatar {
    width: 64px; height: 64px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--purple-mid), var(--pink));
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 2rem;
  }
  .detail-info-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
  .detail-field label { font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--gray); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; }
  .detail-field p { font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--dark); margin-top: 2px; }
  .doctor-comment {
    background: var(--purple-bg);
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 16px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    border-left: 4px solid var(--purple-mid);
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    color: var(--dark);
    line-height: 1.6;
  }
  .next-appt {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--purple-dark), var(--purple-mid));
    color: white;
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 16px 20px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
  }
  .next-appt .label { font-size: 0.78rem; opacity: 0.8; }
  .next-appt .date { font-weight: 800; font-size: 1rem; }

  /* ===== PROFILE ===== */
  .profile-layout { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 280px 1fr; gap: 32px; }
  .profile-sidebar {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--purple-dark), var(--purple-mid));
    border-radius: 20px;
    padding: 32px 24px;
    color: white;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .profile-avatar-big {
    width: 96px; height: 96px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 3rem;
    margin: 0 auto 16px;
    border: 3px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
  }
  .profile-name { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.3rem; margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .profile-email { opacity: 0.75; font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 24px; }
  .profile-menu-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 12px 16px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.2s;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
  }
  .profile-menu-item:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.22); }
  .profile-menu-item:active { transform: scale(0.97); }
  .profile-menu-item { user-select: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; }
  .profile-content-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.4rem;
    color: var(--purple-dark);
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }

  /* ===== PETS PAGE ===== */
  .pets-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 32px; }
  .pet-card {
    background: white;
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 24px;
    border: 2px solid var(--border);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    text-align: center;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.25s;
  }
  .pet-card:hover {
    border-color: var(--purple-mid);
    transform: translateY(-4px);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 28px rgba(91,63,166,0.15);
  }
  .pet-card-avatar {
    width: 72px; height: 72px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--purple-mid), var(--pink));
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 2rem;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }
  .pet-card-name { font-weight: 800; font-size: 1.1rem; margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .pet-card-meta { color: var(--gray); font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .pet-tag {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 3px 10px;
    border-radius: 20px;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
  }
  .tag-dog { background: #e3f2fd; color: #1565c0; }
  .tag-cat { background: #fce4ec; color: #c62828; }
  .tag-bird { background: #e8f5e9; color: #2e7d32; }
  .pet-card-actions { display: flex; gap: 8px; width: 100%; }
  .pet-card-actions button { flex: 1; }

  .add-pet-form { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 32px; }
  .add-pet-visual {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--purple-dark), var(--purple-mid));
    border-radius: 20px;
    padding: 48px 32px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: white;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .add-pet-visual .big { font-size: 4rem; margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .add-pet-visual h2 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.6rem; margin-bottom: 10px; }
  .add-pet-visual p { opacity: 0.8; line-height: 1.6; }

  /* ===== TABS ===== */
  .tab-row { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 28px; }
  .tab {
    padding: 10px 24px;
    border-radius: 30px;
    border: 2px solid var(--border);
    background: white;
    font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s;
    color: var(--gray);
  }
  .tab.active, .tab:hover {
    background: var(--purple-dark);
    color: white;
    border-color: var(--purple-dark);
  }

  /* SECTION HEADER */
  .section-header {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }
  .section-header h2 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.3rem; color: var(--purple-dark); }

  /* DIVIDER */
  .divider { height: 1px; background: var(--border); margin: 24px 0; }


  /* ===== MOBILE NAV ===== */
  .hamburger {
    display: none;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 5px;
    background: none;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    padding: 6px;
  }
  .hamburger span {
    display: block;
    width: 24px;
    height: 2px;
    background: white;
    border-radius: 2px;
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }
  .mobile-nav {
    display: none;
    flex-direction: column;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--purple-dark), var(--purple-mid));
    padding: 16px;
    gap: 6px;
  }
  .mobile-nav.open { display: flex; }
  .mobile-nav .nav-btn {
    text-align: left;
    padding: 12px 16px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-size: 1rem;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85);
  }
  .mobile-nav .nav-btn.active, .mobile-nav .nav-btn:hover {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
    color: white;
  }

  /* ===== PET PHOTO ===== */
  .pet-photo {
    width: 100%;
    height: 180px;
    object-fit: cover;
    border-radius: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }
  .hero-pet-img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    border-radius: 24px;
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
  }
  .hero-visual { position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
  .hero-visual-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(91,63,166,0.75) 0%, rgba(124,92,191,0.55) 60%, rgba(209,123,191,0.65) 100%);
    border-radius: 24px;
  }
  .hero-visual-content {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    min-height: 380px;
    padding: 48px;
    text-align: center;
  }

  /* ===== RESPONSIVE ===== */
  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .hamburger { display: flex; }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    .navbar { padding: 0 20px; height: 60px; }

    .screen { padding: 16px; }
    .card { padding: 20px; }

    .hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 24px; min-height: auto; padding: 20px 0; }
    .hero-text h1 { font-size: 2rem; }
    .hero-visual { min-height: 280px; }
    .hero-visual-content { min-height: 280px; padding: 28px; }
    .hero-btns { flex-direction: column; }
    .hero-btns .btn { width: 100%; text-align: center; }

    .auth-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 20px; }
    .auth-side { min-height: auto; padding: 28px 20px; }

    .stats-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
    .stat-card { padding: 16px; gap: 10px; }
    .stat-value { font-size: 1.3rem; }

    .home-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 16px; }
    .appt-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 20px; }
    .records-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 16px; }
    .profile-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 16px; }
    .pets-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 14px; }
    .add-pet-form { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 16px; }
    .add-pet-visual { padding: 28px 20px; }

    .card-split, .card-split.three { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .form-row, .form-row.three { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 0; }

    .tab-row { flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; }
    .tab { padding: 8px 16px; font-size: 0.82rem; }

    .page-title { font-size: 1.5rem; }
    .btn { padding: 11px 24px; }

    .profile-sidebar { border-radius: 14px; padding: 24px 16px; }
    .profile-layout > div:last-child { min-width: 0; }

    .appt-summary { padding: 20px; }
    .service-chips { gap: 8px; }
    .chip { padding: 7px 14px; font-size: 0.8rem; }

    .success-box { padding: 32px 24px; margin: 16px; }

    .quick-btn { font-size: 0.88rem; padding: 14px 16px; }
  }

  @media (max-width: 480px) {
    .pets-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .stats-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .hero-text h1 { font-size: 1.7rem; }
    .pet-card { padding: 16px; }
  }

</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAVBAR -->
<nav class="navbar">
  <div class="logo">🐾 Pet<span>Care</span></div>
  <div class="nav-links">
    <button class="nav-btn active" onclick="showScreen('landing')">Home</button>
    <button class="nav-btn" onclick="showScreen('signup')">Sign Up</button>
    <button class="nav-btn" onclick="showScreen('login')">Login</button>
    <button class="nav-btn" onclick="showScreen('dashboard')">Dashboard</button>
    <button class="nav-btn" onclick="showScreen('appointment')">Appointments</button>
    <button class="nav-btn" onclick="showScreen('pets')">My Pets</button>
    <button class="nav-btn" onclick="showScreen('records')">Records</button>
    <button class="nav-btn" onclick="showScreen('profile')">Profile</button>
  </div>
  <button class="hamburger" id="hamburger" onclick="toggleMobileNav()" aria-label="Menu">
    <span></span><span></span><span></span>
  </button>
</nav>
<nav class="mobile-nav" id="mobile-nav">
  <button class="nav-btn active" onclick="showScreen('landing');toggleMobileNav()">🏠 Home</button>
  <button class="nav-btn" onclick="showScreen('signup');toggleMobileNav()">📝 Sign Up</button>
  <button class="nav-btn" onclick="showScreen('login');toggleMobileNav()">🔐 Login</button>
  <button class="nav-btn" onclick="showScreen('dashboard');toggleMobileNav()">📊 Dashboard</button>
  <button class="nav-btn" onclick="showScreen('appointment');toggleMobileNav()">📅 Appointments</button>
  <button class="nav-btn" onclick="showScreen('pets');toggleMobileNav()">🐾 My Pets</button>
  <button class="nav-btn" onclick="showScreen('records');toggleMobileNav()">📋 Records</button>
  <button class="nav-btn" onclick="showScreen('profile');toggleMobileNav()">👤 Profile</button>
</nav>

<!-- =================== LANDING =================== -->
<div id="landing" class="screen active">
  <div class="hero">
    <div class="hero-text">
      <h1>Your pet's <em>health companion</em>, all in one place.</h1>
      <p>PetCare brings together appointment booking, pet profiles, medical records, and vaccination reminders — so you can focus on what matters: your pet.</p>
      <div class="hero-btns">
        <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="showScreen('signup')">Get Started</button>
        <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="showScreen('login')">Log In</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-visual">
      <img class="hero-pet-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Happy dog">
      <div class="hero-visual-overlay"></div>
      <div class="hero-visual-content">
        <div class="big-emoji">🐶🐱🐦</div>
        <h2>PetCare Veterinary System</h2>
        <p>Trusted by pet owners and veterinary clinics across the country</p>
        <div class="feature-pills">
          <span class="pill">📅 Appointments</span>
          <span class="pill">🩺 Medical Records</span>
          <span class="pill">💉 Vaccinations</span>
          <span class="pill">🔔 Reminders</span>
          <span class="pill">👤 Pet Profiles</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- =================== SIGN UP =================== -->
<div id="signup" class="screen">
  <div class="auth-layout">
    <div class="auth-side" style="position:relative;overflow:hidden;">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Happy dog" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;opacity:0.25;border-radius:20px;">
      <div style="position:relative;z-index:1;">
        <div class="big">🐾</div>
        <h2>Let's Get Started!</h2>
        <p>Join PetCare today and give your pet the healthcare management they deserve.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <div class="auth-form-title">Create Account</div>
      <p class="page-subtitle">Fill in your details to get started</p>
      <div class="form-row">
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>First Name</label>
          <input type="text" placeholder="e.g. Ahmad">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Last Name</label>
          <input type="text" placeholder="e.g. Razali">
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Email Address</label>
        <input type="email" placeholder="your@email.com">
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Password</label>
        <input type="password" placeholder="Min 8 characters">
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Confirm Password</label>
        <input type="password" placeholder="Repeat password">
      </div>
      <div class="terms-row">
        <input type="checkbox" id="terms">
        <label for="terms">I agree to the <a href="#" style="color:var(--purple-mid)">Terms of Service</a> and <a href="#" style="color:var(--purple-mid)">Privacy Policy</a></label>
      </div>
      <button class="btn btn-primary" style="width:100%" onclick="showSuccess('Registration complete! Welcome to PetCare! 🎉', 'Your account has been created successfully.', 'login')">Sign Up</button>
      <div class="auth-switch">Already have an account? <a onclick="showScreen('login')">Log In</a></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- =================== LOGIN =================== -->
<div id="login" class="screen">
  <div class="auth-layout">
    <div class="auth-side" style="position:relative;overflow:hidden;">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Cat" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;opacity:0.22;border-radius:20px;">
      <div style="position:relative;z-index:1;">
        <div class="big">🔐</div>
        <h2>Welcome Back!</h2>
        <p>Log in to access your pets' health information and upcoming appointments.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <div class="auth-form-title">Welcome Back!</div>
      <p class="page-subtitle">Enter your credentials to continue</p>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Email Address</label>
        <input type="email" placeholder="your@email.com">
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Password</label>
        <input type="password" placeholder="Your password">
      </div>
      <div style="text-align:right; margin-bottom:20px;">
        <a href="#" style="color:var(--purple-mid); font-size:0.88rem; font-weight:700;">Forgot Password?</a>
      </div>
      <button class="btn btn-primary" style="width:100%" onclick="showScreen('dashboard')">Log In</button>
      <div class="auth-switch">Don't have an account? <a onclick="showScreen('signup')">Sign Up</a></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- =================== DASHBOARD =================== -->
<div id="dashboard" class="screen">
  <div class="page-title">Dashboard</div>
  <p class="page-subtitle">Welcome back! Here's an overview of your pets' health.</p>

  <div class="stats-row">
    <div class="stat-card">
      <div class="stat-icon">🐾</div>
      <div>
        <div class="stat-label">My Pets</div>
        <div class="stat-value">2</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-card">
      <div class="stat-icon">📅</div>
      <div>
        <div class="stat-label">Upcoming Appt.</div>
        <div class="stat-value">3</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-card">
      <div class="stat-icon">💉</div>
      <div>
        <div class="stat-label">Vaccinations</div>
        <div class="stat-value">5</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-card">
      <div class="stat-icon">📋</div>
      <div>
        <div class="stat-label">Medical Records</div>
        <div class="stat-value">8</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="home-grid">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="section-header">
        <h2>Your Pets</h2>
        <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="showScreen('pets')">+ Add Pet</button>
      </div>
      <div class="pet-list-item" onclick="showScreen('pets')">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Lala" style="width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;flex-shrink:0;">
        <div>
          <div class="pet-name">Lala</div>
          <div class="pet-meta">Tabby · 2 Years · Female</div>
        </div>
        <span class="record-badge badge-green" style="margin-left:auto">Healthy</span>
      </div>
      <div class="pet-list-item" onclick="showScreen('pets')">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Nigel" style="width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;flex-shrink:0;">
        <div>
          <div class="pet-name">Nigel</div>
          <div class="pet-meta">White Cockatoo · 7 Years · Male</div>
        </div>
        <span class="record-badge badge-blue" style="margin-left:auto">Due Check-up</span>
      </div>
      <div class="divider"></div>
      <div class="section-header">
        <h2>Upcoming Appointments</h2>
        <button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" onclick="showScreen('appointment')">View All</button>
      </div>
      <div class="appt-mini">
        <div class="appt-title">💉 Rabies Booster — Lala</div>
        <div class="appt-date">23 May 2026 · 2:30 PM · Dr. Sarah</div>
      </div>
      <div class="appt-mini">
        <div class="appt-title">🩺 Annual Wellness Exam — Nigel</div>
        <div class="appt-date">01 Jun 2026 · 4:00 PM · Dr. Ahmad</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:20px">
        <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:var(--purple-dark);margin-bottom:16px;">Quick Actions</h2>
        <div class="quick-actions">
          <button class="quick-btn" onclick="showScreen('appointment')">📅 Book Appointment</button>
          <button class="quick-btn" onclick="showScreen('pets')">🐾 Add New Pet</button>
          <button class="quick-btn outline" onclick="showScreen('records')">📋 View Records</button>
          <button class="quick-btn outline">📞 Call Clinic</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card">
        <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:var(--purple-dark);margin-bottom:16px;">🔔 Reminders</h2>
        <div class="appt-mini" style="border-left-color:#e91e63">
          <div class="appt-title">💉 Lala's Vaccination Due</div>
          <div class="appt-date">In 25 days</div>
        </div>
        <div class="appt-mini">
          <div class="appt-title">🩺 Nigel's Check-up Overdue</div>
          <div class="appt-date">2 weeks ago</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- =================== APPOINTMENT =================== -->
<div id="appointment" class="screen">
  <div class="page-title">Book Appointment</div>
  <p class="page-subtitle">Schedule a veterinary visit for your pet.</p>

  <div class="appt-grid">
    <div class="card">
      <h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.2rem;color:var(--purple-dark);margin-bottom:20px;">Booking Details</h3>
      <div class="form-row">
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Owner First Name</label>
          <input type="text" placeholder="First" id="appt-first">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Owner Last Name</label>
          <input type="text" placeholder="Last" id="appt-last">
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Phone Number</label>
        <input type="tel" placeholder="0123456789" id="appt-phone">
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Email Address</label>
        <input type="email" placeholder="your@email.com" id="appt-email">
      </div>
      <div class="divider"></div>
      <div class="form-row">
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Pet's Name</label>
          <input type="text" placeholder="e.g. Lala" id="appt-petname">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Breed</label>
          <input type="text" placeholder="e.g. Tabby">
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-row">
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Pet's Age</label>
          <input type="text" placeholder="e.g. 2 years">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Gender</label>
          <div class="radio-group">
            <label><input type="radio" name="appt-gender" value="Male"> Male</label>
            <label><input type="radio" name="appt-gender" value="Female"> Female</label>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Type of Service</label>
        <div class="service-chips">
          <div class="chip selected" onclick="selectChip(this,'appt-service','Checkup')">🩺 Checkup</div>
          <div class="chip" onclick="selectChip(this,'appt-service','Vaccination')">💉 Vaccination</div>
          <div class="chip" onclick="selectChip(this,'appt-service','Treatment')">💊 Treatment</div>
          <div class="chip" onclick="selectChip(this,'appt-service','Grooming')">✂️ Grooming</div>
        </div>
        <input type="hidden" id="appt-service" value="Checkup">
      </div>
      <div class="form-row">
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Preferred Date</label>
          <input type="date" id="appt-date">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Preferred Time</label>
          <div class="radio-group">
            <label><input type="radio" name="appt-time" value="2:30 PM" checked> 2:30 PM</label>
            <label><input type="radio" name="appt-time" value="4:00 PM"> 4:00 PM</label>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>First time at our clinic?</label>
        <div class="radio-group">
          <label><input type="radio" name="first-visit" value="yes"> Yes</label>
          <label><input type="radio" name="first-visit" value="no" checked> No</label>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Additional Notes</label>
        <textarea placeholder="Any special concerns or requests..."></textarea>
      </div>
      <button class="btn btn-primary" style="width:100%" onclick="showSuccess('Booking Confirmed! 📅', 'Your appointment has been successfully submitted.', 'dashboard')">Submit Booking</button>
    </div>

    <div>
      <div class="appt-summary">
        <h3>📋 Booking Summary</h3>
        <div class="summary-item">
          <div class="summary-label">Owner</div>
          <div class="summary-value" id="sum-owner">—</div>
        </div>
        <div class="summary-item">
          <div class="summary-label">Pet Name</div>
          <div class="summary-value" id="sum-pet">—</div>
        </div>
        <div class="summary-item">
          <div class="summary-label">Service</div>
          <div class="summary-value" id="sum-service">Checkup</div>
        </div>
        <div class="summary-item">
          <div class="summary-label">Date & Time</div>
          <div class="summary-value" id="sum-date">—</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="card" style="margin-top:20px">
        <h3 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--purple-dark);margin-bottom:16px;">🏥 Clinic Information</h3>
        <p style="color:var(--gray);font-size:0.9rem;line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:12px;">
          <strong>PetCare Veterinary Clinic</strong><br>
          123 Jalan Veterinar, Selangor<br>
          📞 03-1234 5678<br>
          📧 info@petcare.my
        </p>
        <p style="color:var(--gray);font-size:0.88rem;line-height:1.6;">
          <strong>Operating Hours</strong><br>
          Mon–Fri: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM<br>
          Sat: 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM<br>
          Sun & Public Holidays: Closed
        </p>
        <div class="divider"></div>
        <button class="btn btn-secondary" style="width:100%">📞 Call Clinic</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- =================== PETS =================== -->
<div id="pets" class="screen">
  <div class="tab-row">
    <button class="tab active" onclick="switchTab(this,'pets-list')">My Pets</button>
    <button class="tab" onclick="switchTab(this,'pets-add')">Add New Pet</button>
  </div>

  <!-- MY PETS -->
  <div id="pets-list">
    <div class="page-title">My Pets</div>
    <p class="page-subtitle">Manage all your pet profiles in one place.</p>
    <div class="pets-grid">
      <div class="pet-card">
        <img class="pet-photo" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Lala the cat">
        <div class="pet-card-name">Lala</div>
        <div class="pet-card-meta">2 Years Old · Female</div>
        <span class="pet-tag tag-cat">Cat · Tabby</span>
        <div style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--gray);margin-bottom:12px;">Owner: Haiqal · 012-345 6789</div>
        <div class="pet-card-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" onclick="showEditPet()">✏️ Edit</button>
          <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="showScreen('records')">📋 Records</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="pet-card">
        <img class="pet-photo" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Nigel the cockatoo">
        <div class="pet-card-name">Nigel</div>
        <div class="pet-card-meta">7 Years Old · Male</div>
        <span class="pet-tag tag-bird">Bird · White Cockatoo</span>
        <div style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--gray);margin-bottom:12px;">Owner: Haiqal · 012-345 6789</div>
        <div class="pet-card-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" onclick="showEditPet()">✏️ Edit</button>
          <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="showScreen('records')">📋 Records</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="pet-card" style="border-style:dashed;cursor:pointer;" onclick="switchTabById('pets-add')">
        <div class="pet-card-avatar" style="background:var(--purple-bg);color:var(--purple-mid)">+</div>
        <div class="pet-card-name" style="color:var(--purple-mid)">Add New Pet</div>
        <div class="pet-card-meta">Click to add another pet profile</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- EDIT PET PANEL -->
    <div id="edit-pet-panel" style="display:none">
      <div class="section-header">
        <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.4rem;color:var(--purple-dark)">Edit Pet Profile — Lala</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="card">
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;gap:12px;margin-bottom:20px;">
          <button class="btn btn-success btn-sm" onclick="showSuccess('Pet Updated! ✅','Pet details have been saved successfully.','pets')">💾 Save</button>
          <button class="btn btn-danger btn-sm" onclick="showSuccess('Pet Removed 🗑️','The pet profile has been removed.','pets')">🗑️ Remove</button>
        </div>
        <div class="form-row">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>Pet's Name</label>
            <input type="text" value="Lala">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>Species</label>
            <div class="radio-group">
              <label><input type="radio" name="edit-species" checked> Dog</label>
              <label><input type="radio" name="edit-species"> Cat</label>
              <label><input type="radio" name="edit-species"> Other</label>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-row">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>Pet's Age</label>
            <input type="text" value="2 Years">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>Gender</label>
            <div class="radio-group">
              <label><input type="radio" name="edit-gender"> Male</label>
              <label><input type="radio" name="edit-gender" checked> Female</label>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-row">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>Owner First Name</label>
            <input type="text" value="Haiqal">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>Owner Last Name</label>
            <input type="text" value="Rahman">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Email</label>
          <input type="email" value="haiqal@gmail.com">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Phone</label>
          <input type="tel" value="012-345 6789">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Health & Medical Background</label>
          <textarea>Healthy. No known allergies. Vaccinated for rabies and distemper.</textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ADD PET -->
  <div id="pets-add" style="display:none">
    <div class="add-pet-form">
      <div class="add-pet-visual">
        <div class="big">🐾</div>
        <h2>Add a New Pet</h2>
        <p>Fill in your pet's details to create their health profile in the system.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="card">
        <div class="auth-form-title" style="margin-bottom:4px">Pet Information</div>
        <p class="page-subtitle">Enter your new pet's details below</p>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Pet's Name</label>
          <input type="text" placeholder="e.g. Max">
        </div>
        <div class="form-row">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>Species</label>
            <div class="radio-group">
              <label><input type="radio" name="add-species"> Dog</label>
              <label><input type="radio" name="add-species"> Cat</label>
              <label><input type="radio" name="add-species"> Other</label>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>Pet's Age</label>
            <input type="text" placeholder="e.g. 3 years">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Gender</label>
          <div class="radio-group">
            <label><input type="radio" name="add-gender"> Male</label>
            <label><input type="radio" name="add-gender"> Female</label>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-row">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>Owner First Name</label>
            <input type="text" placeholder="First">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>Owner Last Name</label>
            <input type="text" placeholder="Last">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Email</label>
          <input type="email" placeholder="owner@email.com">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Phone</label>
          <input type="tel" placeholder="012-345 6789">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Health & Medical Background</label>
          <textarea placeholder="Any known allergies, conditions, or health history..."></textarea>
        </div>
        <button class="btn btn-primary" style="width:100%" onclick="showSuccess('Pet Added! 🐾','Your new pet profile has been created successfully.','pets')">Add Pet</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- =================== RECORDS =================== -->
<div id="records" class="screen">
  <div class="page-title">Health Records</div>
  <p class="page-subtitle">View past treatments and medical history for your pets.</p>
  <div class="records-grid">
    <div>
      <div class="card">
        <div class="section-header">
          <h2>All Records</h2>
          <select style="font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;font-size:0.85rem;padding:6px 12px;border-radius:8px;border:2px solid var(--border)">
            <option>All Pets</option>
            <option>Lala</option>
            <option>Nigel</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="record-item active" onclick="showRecord('vacc')">
          <div class="record-icon vacc">💉</div>
          <div>
            <div style="font-weight:800;font-size:0.95rem">Vaccination</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--gray)">Rabies Booster · Lala · Dr. Sarah</div>
          </div>
          <div style="text-align:right;margin-left:auto">
            <div style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--gray)">Feb 7, 2026</div>
            <span class="record-badge badge-green">Done</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="record-item" onclick="showRecord('check')">
          <div class="record-icon check">🩺</div>
          <div>
            <div style="font-weight:800;font-size:0.95rem">Checkup</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--gray)">Annual Wellness Exam · Nigel · Dr. Sarah</div>
          </div>
          <div style="text-align:right;margin-left:auto">
            <div style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--gray)">Jan 2, 2026</div>
            <span class="record-badge badge-blue">Reviewed</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="record-item" onclick="showRecord('treat')">
          <div class="record-icon treat">💊</div>
          <div>
            <div style="font-weight:800;font-size:0.95rem">Treatment</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--gray)">Ear Infection Treatment · Lala · Dr. Sarah</div>
          </div>
          <div style="text-align:right;margin-left:auto">
            <div style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--gray)">Feb 7, 2026</div>
            <span class="record-badge badge-pink">Ongoing</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card" id="record-detail">
      <div class="detail-header">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Lala" style="width:56px;height:56px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;border:3px solid var(--purple-mid);">
        <div>
          <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.3rem;color:var(--purple-dark)">Lala</div>
          <div style="color:var(--gray);font-size:0.88rem">Past Treatment Record</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-info-grid">
        <div class="detail-field"><label>Owner</label><p>Tabby</p></div>
        <div class="detail-field"><label>Pet's Age</label><p>2 Years</p></div>
        <div class="detail-field"><label>Phone Number</label><p>012 345 67888</p></div>
        <div class="detail-field"><label>Email</label><p>tabby01@gmail.com</p></div>
        <div class="detail-field"><label>Last Treatment</label><p id="rec-date">02.07.2026</p></div>
        <div class="detail-field"><label>Type of Treatment</label><p id="rec-type">Rabies Booster</p></div>
      </div>
      <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--purple-dark);margin-bottom:8px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;">Comment from Doctor</div>
      <div class="doctor-comment" id="rec-comment">
        Continue monitoring its condition and follow the prescribed treatment. Regular check-ups are important to ensure full recovery and prevent further complications.
      </div>
      <div class="next-appt">
        <span style="font-size:1.4rem">📅</span>
        <div>
          <div class="label">Next Appointment</div>
          <div class="date" id="rec-next">23-05-2026</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- =================== PROFILE =================== -->
<div id="profile" class="screen">
  <div class="page-title">My Profile</div>
  <p class="page-subtitle">Manage your account settings and personal information.</p>
  <div class="profile-layout">
    <div class="profile-sidebar">
      <div class="profile-avatar-big">👤</div>
      <div class="profile-name">Pet Owner</div>
      <div class="profile-email">petowner@gmail.com</div>
      <div class="profile-menu-item" onclick="switchTabFromSidebar('edit-profile-tab')">✏️ Edit Profile</div>
      <div class="profile-menu-item" onclick="switchTabFromSidebar('account-settings-tab')">⚙️ Account Settings</div>
      <div class="profile-menu-item" onclick="switchTabFromSidebar('notif-tab')">🔔 Notifications</div>
      <div class="profile-menu-item" onclick="showSuccess('Clinic Information 🏥','PetCare Veterinary Clinic\n123 Jalan Veterinar, Selangor\n📞 03-1234 5678\n📧 info@petcare.my','profile')">🏥 Clinic Information</div>
      <div class="profile-menu-item" onclick="showSuccess('Help & Support ❓','For assistance, contact us at support@petcare.my or call 03-1234 5678. Our support team is available Mon–Fri, 9am–6pm.','profile')">❓ Help & Support</div>
      <div class="divider" style="border-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);margin:16px 0"></div>
      <button class="btn" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);color:white;width:100%;font-size:0.9rem" onclick="showScreen('landing')">🚪 Log Out</button>
    </div>

    <div>
      <div class="tab-row">
        <button class="tab active" onclick="switchTab(this,'edit-profile-tab')">Edit Profile</button>
        <button class="tab" onclick="switchTab(this,'account-settings-tab')">Account Settings</button>
        <button class="tab" onclick="switchTab(this,'notif-tab')">Notifications</button>
      </div>

      <!-- EDIT PROFILE -->
      <div id="edit-profile-tab" class="card">
        <div class="profile-content-title">Edit Profile</div>
        <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:24px">
          <div style="width:80px;height:80px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--purple-bg);border:3px solid var(--purple-mid);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:2.5rem;margin:0 auto 10px">👤</div>
          <button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm">📷 Change Photo</button>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Full Name</label>
          <input type="text" placeholder="Your full name">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label>Email Address</label>
          <input type="email" placeholder="your@email.com">
        </div>
        <div class="form-row">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>New Password</label>
            <input type="password" placeholder="New password">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label>Confirm Password</label>
            <input type="password" placeholder="Repeat password">
          </div>
        </div>
        <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="showSuccess('Profile Updated! ✅','Your profile information has been saved.','profile')">Save Changes</button>
      </div>

      <!-- ACCOUNT SETTINGS -->
      <div id="account-settings-tab" class="card" style="display:none">
        <div class="profile-content-title">Account Settings</div>
        <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:16px;background:var(--purple-bg)">
          <h3 style="margin-bottom:12px;color:var(--purple-dark)">🔑 Change Password</h3>
          <div class="form-group"><label>Current Password</label><input type="password" placeholder="Current password"></div>
          <div class="form-group"><label>New Password</label><input type="password" placeholder="New password"></div>
          <div class="form-group"><label>Confirm Password</label><input type="password" placeholder="Repeat new password"></div>
          <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="showSuccess('Password Changed! 🔑','Your password has been updated successfully.','profile')">Update Password</button>
        </div>
        <div class="card" style="background:#fff5f5;border-color:#ffd6d6">
          <h3 style="margin-bottom:8px;color:var(--red)">⚠️ Delete Account</h3>
          <p style="color:var(--gray);font-size:0.88rem;margin-bottom:12px">This action is permanent and cannot be undone.</p>
          <button class="btn btn-danger btn-sm">Delete My Account</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- NOTIFICATIONS -->
      <div id="notif-tab" class="card" style="display:none">
        <div class="profile-content-title">Notification Settings</div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:16px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)">
          <div>
            <div style="font-weight:700">Appointment Reminders</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--gray)">Get notified 24hrs before appointments</div>
          </div>
          <input type="checkbox" checked style="width:20px;height:20px;accent-color:var(--purple-mid)">
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:16px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)">
          <div>
            <div style="font-weight:700">Vaccination Reminders</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--gray)">Notified when vaccinations are due</div>
          </div>
          <input type="checkbox" checked style="width:20px;height:20px;accent-color:var(--purple-mid)">
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:16px 0">
          <div>
            <div style="font-weight:700">Clinic Announcements</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--gray)">News and updates from the clinic</div>
          </div>
          <input type="checkbox" style="width:20px;height:20px;accent-color:var(--purple-mid)">
        </div>
        <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="showSuccess('Settings Saved! 🔔','Your notification preferences have been updated.','profile')">Save Preferences</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- =================== SUCCESS POPUP =================== -->
<div class="success-popup" id="success-popup">
  <div class="success-box">
    <div class="success-icon">✅</div>
    <h3 id="success-title">Done!</h3>
    <p id="success-msg">Action completed successfully.</p>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="closeSuccess()">Back</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  let successTarget = null;

  function toggleMobileNav() {
    const nav = document.getElementById('mobile-nav');
    nav.classList.toggle('open');
  }


  function showScreen(id) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.screen').forEach(s => s.classList.remove('active'));
    document.getElementById(id).classList.add('active');
    document.querySelectorAll('.nav-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
    const map = {landing:0,signup:1,login:2,dashboard:3,appointment:4,pets:5,records:6,profile:7};
    const btns = document.querySelectorAll('.nav-links .nav-btn');
    if (map[id] !== undefined && btns[map[id]]) btns[map[id]].classList.add('active');
    // update mobile nav active state
    const mbtns = document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav .nav-btn');
    mbtns.forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
    if (map[id] !== undefined && mbtns[map[id]]) mbtns[map[id]].classList.add('active');
    document.getElementById('mobile-nav').classList.remove('open');
    window.scrollTo(0,0);
  }

  function showSuccess(title, msg, target) {
    document.getElementById('success-title').textContent = title;
    document.getElementById('success-msg').textContent = msg;
    successTarget = target;
    document.getElementById('success-popup').classList.add('show');
  }

  function closeSuccess() {
    document.getElementById('success-popup').classList.remove('show');
    if (successTarget) { showScreen(successTarget); successTarget = null; }
  }

  function switchTabFromSidebar(targetId) {
    // Sync the tab row buttons
    const tabMap = {
      'edit-profile-tab': 0,
      'account-settings-tab': 1,
      'notif-tab': 2
    };
    const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('#profile .tab-row .tab');
    tabs.forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
    if (tabMap[targetId] !== undefined && tabs[tabMap[targetId]]) {
      tabs[tabMap[targetId]].classList.add('active');
    }
    // Hide all tab panels
    ['pets-list','pets-add','edit-profile-tab','account-settings-tab','notif-tab'].forEach(id => {
      const el = document.getElementById(id);
      if (el) el.style.display = 'none';
    });
    const el = document.getElementById(targetId);
    if (el) el.style.display = 'block';
    // Highlight active sidebar item
    document.querySelectorAll('.profile-menu-item').forEach(item => {
      item.style.background = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)';
    });
    // scroll tab content into view on mobile
    if (window.innerWidth < 769) {
      document.querySelector('.tab-row')?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
    }
  }

  function switchTab(btn, targetId) {
    const parent = btn.closest('.screen') || document;
    btn.closest('.tab-row').querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
    btn.classList.add('active');
    const tabs = ['pets-list','pets-add','edit-profile-tab','account-settings-tab','notif-tab'];
    tabs.forEach(id => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if(el) el.style.display='none'; });
    const el = document.getElementById(targetId);
    if(el) el.style.display='block';
  }

  function switchTabById(targetId) {
    const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('#pets .tab');
    const ids = ['pets-list','pets-add'];
    tabs.forEach((t,i) => { t.classList.toggle('active', ids[i]===targetId); });
    ids.forEach(id => { document.getElementById(id).style.display = id===targetId?'block':'none'; });
  }

  function selectChip(el, hiddenId, val) {
    el.closest('.service-chips').querySelectorAll('.chip').forEach(c => c.classList.remove('selected'));
    el.classList.add('selected');
    document.getElementById(hiddenId).value = val;
    updateSummary();
  }

  function updateSummary() {
    const first = document.getElementById('appt-first')?.value || '';
    const last = document.getElementById('appt-last')?.value || '';
    document.getElementById('sum-owner').textContent = (first+' '+last).trim() || '—';
    document.getElementById('sum-pet').textContent = document.getElementById('appt-petname')?.value || '—';
    document.getElementById('sum-service').textContent = document.getElementById('appt-service')?.value || '—';
    const d = document.getElementById('appt-date')?.value;
    const t = document.querySelector('input[name="appt-time"]:checked')?.value || '';
    document.getElementById('sum-date').textContent = d ? d+' · '+t : '—';
  }

  ['appt-first','appt-last','appt-petname','appt-date'].forEach(id => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if(el) el.addEventListener('input', updateSummary);
  });

  function showEditPet() {
    document.getElementById('edit-pet-panel').style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('edit-pet-panel').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'});
  }

  function showRecord(type) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.record-item').forEach(r => r.classList.remove('active'));
    event.currentTarget.classList.add('active');
    const data = {
      vacc: { date:'02.07.2026', type:'Rabies Booster', comment:'Continue monitoring its condition and follow the prescribed treatment. Regular check-ups are important to ensure full recovery and prevent further complications.', next:'23-05-2026' },
      check: { date:'02.01.2026', type:'Annual Wellness Exam', comment:'Nigel is in good health. Feathers look healthy. Continue current diet and ensure adequate sunlight exposure daily.', next:'02-07-2026' },
      treat: { date:'07.02.2026', type:'Ear Infection Treatment', comment:'Prescribed antibiotic ear drops. Administer twice daily for 7 days. Return for follow-up if symptoms persist after treatment.', next:'14-02-2026' }
    };
    const d = data[type];
    document.getElementById('rec-date').textContent = d.date;
    document.getElementById('rec-type').textContent = d.type;
    document.getElementById('rec-comment').textContent = d.comment;
    document.getElementById('rec-next').textContent = d.next;
  }
</script>
</body>
</html>
